sections.paragraph:
Original: בּצקת

Transliteration: botsqath

Phonetic: bots-cath'

BDB Definition:

Bozkath or Boscath = "rocky height"
  1. a city in Judah in the lowlands toward the Philistines, home of Josiah's mother

Origin: from H1216

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
